challenges.title: Link Type Detector
challenges.description: Style links differently based on their file extension (PDF, DOC, ZIP, image) using only attribute selectors.

challenges.title: Form Validation Styling
challenges.description: Create a form where required fields have a red border, email fields have a blue border, and submit buttons are green — using only attribute selectors.

challenges.title: Data Attribute Table
challenges.description: Build a table where rows are styled based on a data-status attribute (active, inactive, archived).
hints: Add hover effects per status category
